title: Power BI - Embedding And API-Oriented Integration Patterns

confirmed_facts.fact: Power BI documentation includes a dedicated embedded analytics area for integrating Power BI reports and analytics into applications.
Power BI Client APIs can embed interactive reports inside applications for organizational scenarios where users sign in to Power BI.
Power BI quick report embedding can create a dataset and report from application data and let users explore and customize the generated report experience.

implementation_notes: Use this entry as a routing indicator when a Power BI request is about embedding, programmatic report experiences, or app integration rather than standard Desktop or service authoring.
For embedded scenarios, separate the questions of data modeling, report authoring, authentication, and client-side embedding. They are related but not the same implementation step.
If a user wants dashboards or reports inside another application, embedding is usually the right research branch rather than workspace or app distribution alone.
caveats: Embedding is a distinct delivery pattern from normal Power BI service sharing and app distribution.
This pass only establishes the existence and purpose of embedding guidance. Deeper API-by-API extraction should happen when a project explicitly targets embedded analytics.
